name: Daddy Comes Home
short_description: You will play as a father who, in a nightmare, sees his wife and son smiling at him bizarrely. When you wake up, you find that reality is even more cruel.
detailed_description:
Introduction


This is a suspense story driven by plot. The game does not include unnecessary puzzles or character death mechanics.
A wife who is always suspicious of you, a son who ignores you, your family life is barely manageable. Until one day, you find a string of unfamiliar numbers in your wife's clothes. Your nightmare begins here.

Content


  • Exploration: Experience the entire story from a first-person perspective.
  • Linear: A linear plot that focuses on storytelling.
  • Fear: Scary scenes, including jump-scares.
  • Save: The game will auto-save by chapters.

supported_languages: English, Russian, Japanese, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Korean
